lessons.key: surviving_mutant::numeric coefficient fixes restart discontinuity conventions need coefficient level unit tests integration level suites mask o h errors whenever restarts begin at tiny steps 1e 3 dt so assert the exact coefficient tuple
lessons.text: Numeric-coefficient fixes (restart/discontinuity conventions) need coefficient-level unit tests: integration-level suites mask O(h) errors whenever restarts begin at tiny steps (1e-3*dt), so assert the exact coefficient tuple.

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::docstring walk gates must assert an object s own doc or dict doc never inspect getdoc python 3 12 getdoc inherits docstrings from documented non object bases enum so removing a subclass s own class docstring passes the gate
lessons.text: Docstring-walk gates must assert an object's own __doc__ (or __dict__ doc), never inspect.getdoc: Python 3.12+ getdoc inherits docstrings from documented non-object bases (Enum), so removing a subclass's own class docstring passes the gate.

lessons.key: ac_gap::vocabulary removal features must grep string literals and error messages not just identifiers ast bench root module not found survived total bench removal in a reachable pub api error because greps targeted code symbols only
lessons.text: Vocabulary-removal features must grep string literals and error messages, not just identifiers/AST: 'bench root module not found' survived total bench removal in a reachable pub-API error because greps targeted code symbols only.

lessons.key: spec_deviation::a logged spec deviation that changes user visible cli behavior still needs a test asserting the new behavior the piperine run phdl migration notice is implemented but unasserted
lessons.text: A logged SPEC_DEVIATION that changes user-visible CLI behavior still needs a test asserting the new behavior (the piperine run .phdl migration notice is implemented but unasserted).

lessons.key: ac_gap::verifying a cli notice by asserting its text is not enough drive the command with adversarial inputs wrong positional arg broken input file piperine run other phdl silently ignored the arg and a broken design still printed elaborates exit 0 through three verifier rounds
lessons.text: Verifying a CLI notice by asserting its text is not enough: drive the command with adversarial inputs (wrong positional arg, broken input file) — 'piperine run other.phdl' silently ignored the arg and a broken design still printed 'elaborates' exit 0 through three verifier rounds.

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::interpolation or ratio tests must use non uniform sample spacing so a dropped division or normalization is discriminated
lessons.text: Interpolation or ratio tests must use non-uniform sample spacing so a dropped division or normalization is discriminated

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::every fail loud validation branch needs its own negative test that trips it unknown name tests alone leave guard clauses undiscriminated
lessons.text: Every fail-loud validation branch needs its own negative test that trips it; unknown-name tests alone leave guard clauses undiscriminated

lessons.key: ac_gap::a done when that names a specific diagnostic case must have a test asserting that diagnostic message before the task is marked done
lessons.text: A Done-when that names a specific diagnostic case must have a test asserting that diagnostic message before the task is marked done

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::when the spec names an independent reference method assert against that reference not a self consistency proxy
lessons.text: When the spec names an independent reference method, assert against that reference, not a self-consistency proxy

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::a spec claim of golden file validation requires a checked in fixture pair grep the fixtures directory before closing the task
lessons.text: A spec claim of golden-file validation requires a checked-in fixture pair; grep the fixtures directory before closing the task
